stemHtml:
Read the following METAR for station

XXXX: XXXX 291230Z VRB02KT 0900 R36/1100VP1500D FZFG OVC001 M02/M02 Q1029 BECMG 1500 BR OVC002

Which statement about visibility and RVR is correct?

options.a: Prevailing visibility is 900 m, RVR has improved in the last 10 minutes.
options.b: Minimum visibility is 900 m. RVR has improved in the last 10 minutes.
options.c: Prevailing visibility is 900 m, RVR has deteriorated in the last 10 minutes.
options.d: Minimum visibility is 900 m. RVR has deteriorated in the last 10 minutes.
